generated_queries: site:congress.gov "children safety" OR "minor protection" AND ("draft bill" OR "enacted law") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:ftc.gov "e-commerce regulation" OR "social commerce" AND ("regulatory guidance" OR "hearings") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:justice.gov "data localization" AND ("court rulings" OR "enforcement actions") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:whitehouse.gov "children safety" OR "minor protection" AND ("executive order" OR "policy announcement") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]

signals.title: Social Security Child Protection Act of 2025
signals.summary: This bill mandates the reissuance of Social Security numbers to children under 14 if their original numbers were compromised, aiming to prevent identity theft among minors.
key_provisions: Reissuance of Social Security numbers for minors

signals.title: Child Marriage Prevention Act of 2024
signals.summary: This legislation seeks to combat child marriage by establishing federal standards and supporting states in enforcing minimum age requirements for marriage.

signals.title: Child Safety and Well-Being Act of 2024
signals.summary: The act proposes the establishment of an independent Children’s Commission to oversee and advocate for policies promoting child safety and well-being.

signals.title: Kids Online Safety Act
signals.summary: This bill focuses on enhancing online safety measures for minors by requiring online platforms to implement default safeguard settings and parental tools.

signals.title: PROTECT Children's Innocence Act
signals.summary: This act addresses child protection by strengthening penalties for offenses against children and enhancing preventive measures.

signals.title: Children's Protection Act of 2021
signals.summary: This bill requires federal agencies to analyze how certain rules impact children, considering factors like physical safety and health.

signals.title: Digital Asset Market Clarity Act of 2025
signals.summary: This act addresses the fragmented regulatory landscape for digital assets, establishing a compliance roadmap and enhancing consumer protection.
key_provisions: Federal oversight of digital commodity marketplaces

signals.title: FTC's Social Media and Video Streaming Services Report
signals.summary: The FTC report analyzes practices of major tech companies, focusing on content moderation, data privacy, and their impact on children and teens.

signals.title: FTC's Enforcement Statement on Automated Systems
signals.summary: The FTC emphasizes the application of existing laws to automated systems, addressing concerns about biases and discrimination.
key_provisions: Application of laws to automated systems

signals.title: Executive Order 14117
signals.summary: This order directs the DOJ to address national security threats posed by foreign adversaries accessing Americans' sensitive personal data.
key_provisions: Prevention of foreign exploitation of data

signals.title: DOJ's Final Rule Implementing Executive Order 14117
signals.summary: This rule establishes regulations to prevent foreign adversaries from accessing Americans' sensitive data, focusing on designated foreign entities.
key_provisions: Regulations to prevent foreign data access

signals.title: Protecting Americans' Data from Foreign Adversaries Act of 2024
signals.summary: This act restricts data brokers from selling U.S. user data to foreign adversaries, aiming to safeguard national security.
key_provisions: Restrictions on data sales to foreign adversaries
